Junipergrid Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Anouk Mirelez. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Anouk Mirelez is the founder of Junipergrid Labs. Anouk raised concerns about gross margin at the last board sync.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Junipergrid Labs round.
We decided to pass on the Junipergrid Labs round. Pricing is too rich at this stage. Logging it now.
